Test Case: Given server running and embeddings fresh, When status line renders, Then shows emb: {N} chunks checkmark
Given server running but remote commits behind, When status line renders, Then shows emb: stale ({N} commits behind)
Given server running but local files modified, When status line renders, Then shows emb: stale ({N} files modified)
Given both remote commits and local changes, When status line renders, Then shows emb: stale ({N} commits behind, {M} files modified)
Given server not running, When status line renders, Then shows emb: offline
Given embedding generation in progress, When status line renders, Then shows emb: loading...
Given no .emb files exist, When status line renders, Then shows emb: not configured
Given status line disabled via config, When Claude Code starts, Then no status line output
Given health file is fresh, When status line script runs, Then reads from file without probing — display-refresh < 5ms
Given Codex provider, When agent projection is built, Then EMBEDDING_STATUS line reflects health file data
Given server healthy and embeddings fresh, When data-refresh fires, Then health file shows status healthy with chunks and port
Given server goes down between checks, When next data-refresh fires, Then health file updates to offline and transition is logged
Given health_check_interval_minutes set to 2, When status line script runs, Then data-refresh uses 2-minute threshold
Given health probe fails (timeout), When data-refresh fires, Then health file shows offline with error — never crashes
Given health file exists, When tool-router reads it, Then it gets the same structured data for routing
Given Git repo with remote, When staleness runs, Then returns commits_behind and files_changed
Given SVN repo with local modifications, When staleness runs, Then files_changed reflects svn status count
Given no VCS detected, When staleness runs, Then returns nulls with vcs unknown
Given Git repo with no upstream configured, When staleness runs, Then falls back to local HEAD
Given git fetch fails (no network), When staleness runs, Then falls back to local HEAD — fail-open
Given embeddings generated, When .emb manifest is written, Then generatedAtCommit field contains VCS ref
Given files modified locally but not committed, When staleness runs, Then status shows stale with file count
Given any error in status line script, When Claude Code calls it, Then exit 0 with no output
Given health probe times out, When data-refresh runs, Then status offline and script continues
Given VCS commands fail, When staleness runs, Then nulls returned and script continues
